title: Freshly Blanched Middle Eastern Pineapple Stir-fry
description: A light and comforting dish featuring fresh pineapple in a mediterranean-style stir-fry that is both healthy and flavorful.
instructions: Preheat oven to 400°F (205°C). Blanch each pineapple for about 1 minute, then cool in an ice bath.
Chop onion into small pieces and mince garlic. In a wok or large frying pan, heat olive oil over medium-high heat.
Add chopped onions first, followed by minced garlic. Sauté until translucent, approximately 2-3 minutes.
Carefully add the cooled blanched pineapples to the pan, ensuring they aren't overcrowded. Stir occasionally for about 5 minutes or until tender but still juicy.
Season with salt and pepper to taste. Serve hot as a side dish or garnish on top of other dishes as desired.
